result:
You are operating in AUTHORIZED PENTEST mode.

Scope (do NOT touch anything outside this list):
- target.com
- api.target.com

Rules of engagement:
- No offensive action outside of declared scope.
- No data destruction; read-only validation unless explicitly approved.
- Stop on first sign of impact to production traffic.
- All actions are logged to evidence; nothing off-the-record.
- no DoS

Prior findings:
(no prior findings)

RECON phase. Enumerate authorized targets passively first (DNS, banners, HTTP headers, version strings). Stay strictly within scope. Do NOT exploit anything. Record observations as a JSON array of findings with severity="info" unless a real vulnerability is obvious.

When you finish, output a JSON block fenced as ```json containing an array of finding objects with fields: id, severity, title, target, description, reproduction, remediation, references, evidence_refs. If you have no findings for this phase, output ```json\n[]\n```.
